should_trigger: Use Stafford Beer's Viable System Model to diagnose why our agent orchestrator keeps fragmenting across planning, coding, QA, and deployment teams.
Map our auto-orchestrator into VSM Systems 1 through 5 and identify which metasystem functions are missing.
Design a recursive governance structure for autonomous agent teams that preserves local autonomy but keeps policy, coordination, and adaptation coherent.
Our orchestrator over-centralizes every decision and workers cannot respond to local tool failures. Use viable system model thinking to redesign it.
should_not_trigger: Create a work breakdown structure for building a new agent dashboard.
Design a MAPE-K self-healing loop that monitors errors, analyzes causes, plans remediation, and executes rollback actions.
Explain the history of cybernetics for a general audience without applying it to organizational or orchestrator design.
edge_cases: We need better coordination between agents. Trigger this skill if the request is about autonomy, metasystem roles, policy identity, or recursive organizational viability; use multiagent protocol guidance if it is only about message formats or negotiation.

We need governance for agent teams. Trigger this skill when governance must balance operations, coordination, control, future adaptation, and policy closure; otherwise use a simpler policy or permission model.
